free_text: The self-supporting Be target was prepared from a 99%
pure thin foil of beryllium. The target thickness was
12 mum. Peaks due to carbon and oxygen contaminations
were not observed in the energy spectra.
Table data was received from Dr.S.M.Lukyanov
